Rajasthan Royals–Ravindra Jadeja Trade Talks Stall

Nov 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Rajasthan Royals–Ravindra Jadeja Trade Talks Stall

The high-profile Rajasthan Royals–CSK trade involving Ravindra Jadeja has reportedly stalled due to disagreements between franchises over player value and additional demands.
